message:
feat(server,runtime,store): expand connection handling, auth, and data operations

Runtime (fr-runtime):
- Expand authorization and session management logic (+70 lines)
- Additional ACL checking paths and command validation

Server (fr-server):
- Extend TCP connection lifecycle handling (+45 lines)
- Additional protocol processing for edge cases

Store (fr-store):
- Expand data operation support (+22 lines)
- Additional sorted set and key operation refinements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
